defaultPattern.guidance: Search: "<your country> embassy in <destination>". Your ministry of foreign affairs usually publishes the authoritative list.

AR.guidance: Visit cancilleria.gob.ar and open "Representaciones en el exterior" to locate your embassy.
AR.emergencyNote: Consular emergencies are handled by the nearest Argentine embassy; numbers vary by post.

AT.guidance: Use the BMEIA "Botschaften & Konsulate" directory to find the Austrian embassy abroad.

AU.guidance: Use Smartraveller.gov.au or DFAT's "Our missions" directory to find your embassy.

BE.guidance: Use the FPS Foreign Affairs "Embassies and consulates" search on diplomatie.belgium.be.

BG.guidance: Open mfa.bg "Embassies abroad" to locate the nearest Bulgarian mission.

BR.guidance: Visit gov.br/mre "Embaixadas e consulados" to find your Brazilian embassy.
BR.emergencyNote: Itamaraty central switchboard; each post publishes its own 24/7 plantão consular.

CA.guidance: Use travel.gc.ca "Embassies and consulates" or call the Emergency Watch and Response Centre.
CA.emergencyNote: Global Affairs Canada 24/7 Emergency Watch and Response Centre (collect calls accepted)

CY.guidance: Browse mfa.gov.cy "Cyprus Embassies Abroad" for the mission covering your destination.

CZ.guidance: Open mzv.gov.cz, pick the destination country; the page lists the Czech embassy serving it.
CZ.emergencyNote: MZV 24/7 emergency line for Czech citizens abroad

DE.guidance: Use auswaertiges-amt.de "Missions abroad" to find the German embassy at your destination.

DK.guidance: Use um.dk "Find a Danish mission abroad" to locate your embassy.

EE.guidance: Visit vm.ee "Estonian representations" to find the relevant mission.

ES.guidance: Use exteriores.gob.es "Embajadas y Consulados" to find the Spanish post at your destination.

FI.guidance: Open finlandabroad.fi and pick the destination country to find your mission.

FR.guidance: Use France Diplomatie "Ambassades et consulats français à l'étranger" or the Ariane travel registry.
FR.emergencyNote: Centre de crise et de soutien (MEAE) 24/7

GB.guidance: Search "UK embassy in <destination>" on gov.uk; the FCDO page lists the British mission.

GR.guidance: Open mfa.gr, pick the destination country; the entry lists the Greek embassy serving it.

HR.guidance: Use mvep.gov.hr "Veleposlanstva i konzulati RH u svijetu" to locate your mission.

HU.guidance: Open konzuliszolgalat.kormany.hu "Külképviseletek" for the Hungarian mission serving your destination.

IE.guidance: Use dfa.ie "Irish embassies abroad" to find the Embassy of Ireland at your destination.

IN.guidance: Use mea.gov.in "Indian Missions Abroad" to find your embassy or high commission.
IN.emergencyNote: MEA Control Room; also use MADAD portal for consular grievances

IS.guidance: Use government.is "Diplomatic missions" list; Iceland has limited posts, honorary consuls cover many countries.

IT.guidance: Use esteri.it "La Farnesina nel mondo" or the Dove Siamo Nel Mondo travel registry.

JP.guidance: Use mofa.go.jp "Embassies, Consulates and Missions" directory or the Tabi-Regi registration.
JP.emergencyNote: MOFA main switchboard; each embassy publishes its own 24/7 emergency number

KR.guidance: Use mofa.go.kr "Embassies & Consulates" or the Overseas Safe Travel (0404.go.kr) portal.

LI.guidance: Liechtenstein has few missions; Switzerland represents Liechtensteiners consularly in most countries under a 1919 treaty.
LI.emergencyNote: Amt für Auswärtige Angelegenheiten; for Swiss consular cover call the Swiss FDFA Helpline +41 800 24 7 365

LT.guidance: Use urm.lt "Lithuanian missions" to find your embassy abroad.

LU.guidance: Use maee.gouvernement.lu "Représentations luxembourgeoises à l'étranger" for your nearest post.

LV.guidance: Use mfa.gov.lv "Latvian representations" to find the Latvian embassy.

MK.guidance: Open mfa.gov.mk "Embassies of the RNM" for the Macedonian mission serving your destination.

MT.guidance: Use foreign.gov.mt "Maltese Missions" directory for the embassy covering your destination.
MT.emergencyNote: Ministry for Foreign Affairs main line

NL.guidance: Use netherlandsworldwide.nl "Embassies and consulates-general" or register with the BZ Information Service.
NL.emergencyNote: BZ 24/7 Contactcentrum (call from anywhere in the world)

NO.guidance: Open norway.no and choose the destination country for the Norwegian embassy page.

NZ.guidance: Use mfat.govt.nz "Embassies" directory or register travel on SafeTravel.govt.nz.

PL.guidance: Use gov.pl/web/dyplomacja "Polskie placówki" to find the Polish mission.

PT.guidance: Use portaldascomunidades.mne.gov.pt "Rede consular" for the Portuguese embassy or consulate.

RO.guidance: Use mae.ro "Romanian missions" directory to find the embassy covering your destination.

RS.guidance: Open mfa.gov.rs "Serbian missions in the world" for the embassy nearest your destination.
RS.emergencyNote: MFA duty service; each embassy also publishes a 24/7 emergency number

SE.guidance: Open swedenabroad.se and select the destination country for the Swedish embassy page.

SI.guidance: Use gov.si list of Slovenian diplomatic missions and consulates to find your post.
SI.emergencyNote: MZEZ main switchboard; consular duty is routed through it

SK.guidance: Use mzv.sk "Slovak missions abroad" for the embassy serving your destination.

TR.guidance: Use mfa.gov.tr "Turkish Representations" or the Konsolosluk.gov.tr portal; register on e-Konsolosluk before travel.

US.guidance: Visit usembassy.gov and select the destination country from the map; enrol in STEP before travel.
US.emergencyNote: State Department Overseas Citizens Services (from overseas: +1 202 501 4444)
